title: Vivi Sees Through the Trick
description: On pages 8–10, vivi sees through the trick as miss Goldenweek turns Luffy’s emotions against him while Vivi, Nami, and Zoro remain trapped in Mr. 3’s deadly wax display.
scene: Vivi Sees Through the Trick. Miss Goldenweek turns Luffy’s emotions against him while Vivi, Nami, and Zoro remain trapped in Mr. 3’s deadly wax display. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: The painting's on his clothes this time! Luffy! Hurry up and take your shirt off!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Nah, I just wanna laugh instead! Aha- hahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: CRAP... at the current speed this mist of wax is raining down on us, we won't last even a minute more!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: Did you come here to play or what!?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: Damn it! Why's that little bugger so freakin' fast!?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: The painting on Luffy's back faded away a little because he just bumped into Usopp and Karoo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You did something to me again, didn't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Quit it already, that's really annoying!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: In any case, I gotta destroy that pumpkin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Where the hell are you aiming!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: You can't destroy that or Mr. 3 will be angry at me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Just as a charging bull wants to attack a waving red cape, you'll want to attack that "bullfighting red."

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: Aghhhh! I swear I won't forgive you for this! Just get lost!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's useless... he just had to go up against the worst type of enemy possible...!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: Mix melancholic blue with the laughing yellow already on your back to get...

summary: This part centers on vivi sees through the trick, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
